description: Inbound payload validated against intake schema and written to inbox
notes: Server reject sets status to RECEIVED with decision=rejected_forbidden_field if forbidden fields seen

description: Curator has assigned issue_type and priority
notes: P0/P1 must transition to SOURCE_RECHECK_PENDING — direct CLOSED only allowed for spam/unactionable

description: Source URL re-fetch + Wayback re-archive scheduled
notes: Reviewer must NOT bypass even for low-priority items if the issue_type implies source change

description: Source page re-verified; verbatim quote compared
notes: Reviewer records evidence_checked + new archive_urls in audit log
Caveats must NOT be removed; only refined or clarified

description: Primary source URL changed; update + re-archive
notes: New URL re-archived to Wayback before staging

description: Program closed or no longer source-supported; remove from runtime
Reviewer verified claim was already correct
notes: Audit log still required with decision_reason

description: Claim is unclear; flagged for slower review with optional curator-direct outreach
notes: Reopen path documented if institution responds

description: Updated row content written to staged runtime artifact (NOT live)
notes: Active runtime change requires a separate authorized sprint

description: All applicable validators passed against the staged update
notes: Two sign-offs (curator + QA) required before public copy actually updates

description: Terminal state for resolved or rejected items
notes: Reopen creates a new audit_event with action=reopened_with_audit; status transitions back to TRIAGED
